center.name: Bushveld
center.summary: Bushveld是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括灰颈鹭鸨、Red-crested korhaan、Black-backed puffback等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: From the vicinity of the equator and northwards it is replaced by the somewhat larger northern puffback, with which it forms a superspecies. They are commonly found in gardens, riparian thickets, mangroves, woodlands, moist (or less commonly arid) savanna, bushveld and especially towards the south, fringes of afromontane forest. They are present from sea level to some 2,200 m.a.s.l., and are the only puffback species to occur over much of their range. Highest reporting rates are from the densest woodlands, though all woodland types, including Racosperma plantations, are utilized

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Southern Africa, where it lives in woodlands, bushveld and in suburbs

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-crested korhaan inhabits diverse environments: dry savanna, bushveld, thorny scrubland, but sometimes also wet woodland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Struik Winchester, Cape Town. This species occurs in open grassy areas, often characterized by sandy soil, especially Kalahari sands, and short grass usually near the cover of isolated clumps of trees or bushes. It may be found in plains, arid plateaus, highveld grassland, arid scrub, lightly wooded savanna, open dry bushveld and semi-desert.Maclean, G.L
